flows.name: Global Navigation (app-layout)
flows.description: Global nav sidebar with hamburger toggle, slide-out drawer, and auto-close on route change
interaction_sequence: 1. User taps hamburger icon (top-left, always visible on mobile)
2. Drawer slides in from left: x -220 -> 0, ease [0.2,0,0,1]
3. Backdrop overlay appears at z-1001
4. User taps nav item -> route change detected
5. Drawer auto-closes, backdrop fades out

flows.name: IM Mobile Layout (IMShell)
flows.description: IM-specific 3-panel transformation: sidebar + chat + task monitor, with dual floating controls
flows.trigger: Viewport width < 768px activates mobile column layout
interaction_sequence: 1. IM page loads on mobile viewport
2. Layout renders as single column: chat fills full width
3. Two floating buttons appear: hamburger (top-left), panel-toggle (top-right)
4a. Tap hamburger -> sidebar drawer slides in (280px, framer-motion)
4b. Tap panel-toggle -> BottomSheet rises from bottom (task monitor)
5. Chat remains accessible; drawer/sheet overlays do not push content

flows.name: Bottom Sheet Task Monitor
flows.description: Spring-animated bottom sheet for right-panel content (task monitor) on mobile, with drag-to-dismiss and multiple close mechanisms
flows.trigger: Panel-toggle floating button tap on IM mobile layout

dismiss_mechanisms.name: opacity-fade
dismiss_mechanisms.behavior: sheet content opacity transitions with drag progress

interaction_sequence: 1. User taps panel-toggle button (top-right)
2. Backdrop overlay fades in
3. Body scroll locks (overflow: hidden)
4. BottomSheet springs up from bottom: damping 30, stiffness 300
5. Sheet content visible at maxHeight 70vh
6. User interacts with task monitor content inside sheet
7a. Drag down > 80px -> sheet dismisses with spring
7b. Drag with velocity > 500px/s -> sheet dismisses
7c. Tap backdrop -> sheet dismisses
7d. Press Escape -> sheet dismisses
8. Body scroll unlocks

flows.name: Page-Level Mobile Adaptations
flows.description: Per-page mobile readiness assessment across all 10 application pages

pages.name: IM Chat
pages.notes: Primary mobile experience; dual floating controls, full-width chat

pages.name: Workflow Editor
pages.notes: P0 priority: planned read-only mobile view; @xyflow requires significant viewport
pages.gap: No mobile layout exists; page is unusable below 780px

pages.name: Skills
pages.notes: Naturally responsive; card layout reflows to single column on narrow viewports

pages.name: Models
pages.notes: Naturally responsive; form fields stack vertically on mobile

pages.name: Observability
pages.notes: Needs chart resizing and layout adaptation for small screens
pages.gap: Charts may overflow or become unreadable on mobile

pages.name: Graph
pages.notes: Needs mobile adaptation for interactive graph canvas
pages.gap: Canvas interaction model not designed for touch

pages.name: Settings
pages.notes: Naturally responsive; settings forms stack on mobile

pages.name: Login
pages.notes: Naturally responsive; centered login card works at all widths

breakpoints.name: desktop-xl
breakpoints.behavior: Full 3-column layout with generous sidebar and right panel

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.behavior: Same as desktop; tablet landscape treated as desktop

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.behavior: Single column; overflow hidden; panel-left and panel-right hidden; global-nav hidden; IMShell takes over with floating controls

breakpoints.name: mobile-compact
breakpoints.behavior: Compact chat header, messages, and input; font-size reduced to 13px

responsive_patterns.sidebar_behavior: Desktop: persistent grid column. Mobile (< 768px): hidden, accessible via hamburger button triggering framer-motion slide drawer (220px global / 280px IM)
responsive_patterns.right_panel_behavior: Desktop: persistent grid column. Mobile (< 768px): hidden, accessible via panel-toggle button triggering BottomSheet (maxHeight 70vh, spring animation)
responsive_patterns.touch_targets: Floating buttons positioned at top-left (hamburger) and top-right (panel-toggle) with z-index >= 1002 to ensure tap accessibility above all content layers

drawer_slide.description: Custom cubic-bezier with fast start and gentle deceleration

bottom_sheet_spring.description: Tight spring for responsive sheet movement without excessive bounce

drag_dismiss.description: Dual-threshold dismiss: either sufficient drag distance or fast flick

z_index_layers.toast_container: mounted in root layout, highest layer

hooks.name: useIsMobile
hooks.usage: Conditional rendering of mobile-specific UI elements

toast_system.mobile_behavior: Toast overlays work identically on mobile and desktop

not_adapted.name: Workflow Editor
not_adapted.gap: DAG canvas requires min 780px; P0 read-only mode planned
